title: bauhinia corifolia
intro: Bauhinia corifolia, also known as the mountain bauhinia or coral claw, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Bauhinia corifolia include its potential to aid in the treatment of various ailments such as fever, cough, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Bauhinia corifolia can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in Ayurvedic and traditional Chinese medicine.
